BottleneckSummaryText: City A can answer mana_shard pressure with a sharper Dungeon Alpha push, but the surge window closes fast if the party comes back strained.
OpportunityReasonText: Dungeon Alpha's Standard Path is City A's fastest shard spike when immediate stock matters more than a clean follow-up dispatch.
RecommendationRationaleText: Take the Standard Path when City A needs a bigger shard return right now and can afford a rougher recovery cycle afterward.
WhyCityMattersText: City A matters because a short shard surge can reopen the next dispatch window, but overspending the party here narrows that same margin.
